heading: Thirty years or more: regular enlisted members
label: 7317 Thirty years or more: regular enlisted members
text: A regular enlisted member of the Army who has at least 30 years of service computed under shall be retired upon his request.section 7325 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)391710:947 (less proviso).10:947a (less last 11 words).(1st 35 words), .Mar. 2, 1907, ch. 2515, § 134 Stat. 1217(less 43d through 53d words); restated (less 43d through 53d words), .Feb. 14, 1885, ch. 67Sept. 30, 1890, ch. 112526 Stat. 504The word “regular” is inserted to conform to an opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Army (JAGA, 1953/2301, 23 Mar. 1953). The words “upon his request” are substituted for the words “upon making application to the President”, in 10:947, and “by application to the President”, in 10:947a. The words “either as a private or noncommissioned officer, or both”, in 10:947a, are omitted as surplusage. The words “shall be retired” are substituted for the words “be placed upon the retired list”, in 10:947, and “be placed on the retired list heretofore created”, in 10:947a. The words “computed under ” are inserted for clarity. The 21 words before the proviso and the proviso of the Act of , as restated, are not contained in 10:947a. They are also omitted from the revised section, since the proviso is executed and the 21 words before the proviso are omitted as covered by formula E of .section 3925 of this titlesection 3991 of this titleFebruary 14, 1885
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7317 was renumbered .section 8687 of this title
Amendments2018—, substituted “section 7325” for “section 3925”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 808(b)(12)section 3917 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
